word: H1018 - בֵּית הָאֵצֶל - Bêyth hâʼêtsel - bayth haw-ay'-tsel - Beth-ezel

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּית האצל

Transliteration: bêyth hâ'êtsel

Phonetic: bayth haw-ay'-tsel

BDB Definition:

Beth-ezel = "house of narrowing"
  1. a place in Judah

Origin: from H1004 and H681 with the article interposed

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
